mnemonics.title: ALU Functions
mnemonics.content: Add, Subtract, Logic, Compare (ASLC) - core ALU operations

mnemonics.title: Control Unit Signals
mnemonics.content: CORD: Clock, Opcode, Reset, Decode - key CU inputs

acronyms.usage: Architecture optimized for single-cycle simple instructions

visualTips.visualization: Imagine highways connecting ALU, registers, and control signals as traffic lights
Visualize as assembly line stations with instructions moving through FETCH-DECODE-EXECUTE stages

analogies.analogy: Like a calculator that only does basic math operations
Similar to a conductor coordinating an orchestra's timing
